goal: Celtic result on mobile: show the actual cross+staff shape minimized (all at once); tap a card → popup with its position meaning
fix: styles.css @media max-width:640px: the celtic-cross-layout was flex-column of 220px cards (long stack); now keeps the 4-col cross grid with ~80px minimized cards (crossing 'challenge' card keeps its rotated overlap), max-width 360, so the whole cross+staff is visible at once. Tap a slot → openCardSheet enlarges it. reading.js: card sheet gained a small position label (top-left pill); openCardSheet(card,{positionLabel}) sets it; the Celtic slots pass getFullPositionLabel(dict,position). styles.css .card-sheet-position pill.
verified: chrome MCP @390x844 real celtic result: cross+staff shape renders minimized all-at-once; tap 'Above' slot → sheet shows 'ABOVE' label top-left + card + Share Story/meaning. node --check ok; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: Desktop celtic layout unchanged (only the ≤640px block). Position label is hidden when no positionLabel passed (daily/question sheets).
